creator: eadler@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 11 December 2012 15:56,  <eadler@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Synopsis: spanish.dvorak.kbd do not mentioned me.

Hey. I gave you credit in the commit log - you should have gotten an
email at the time:
http://svnweb.freebsd.org/base/head/share/syscons/keymaps/spanish.dvorak.kbd?view=log
I'll add your name too the file too.

Which name and email do you prefer?

-- 
Eitan Adler
Source, Ports, Doc committer
Bugmeister, Ports Security teams
